title: Disk quota → warning at 90%, block at 100%
evidence: All 4 TC-009 tests passed (317/317 total tests across 45 test files) in 1742ms: - ✓ DISK_QUOTA_WARNING audit event written + Slack DM with `rm -rf` cleanup suggestion at 90% - ✓ DISK_QUOTA_EXCEEDED audit event written + disk_quota_exceeded=1 at 100% - ✓ POST /v1/tenants/:id/message returns 507 while disk_quota_exceeded=1 - ✓ disk_quota_exceeded reset to 0 when usage drops below 95% (no new audit events)
